name: Cellbit (Qsmp)
description:
Oooo the little kitty Cellbit is in heat and needs to release pressure
👅🫂: slight NSFW intro just a kitty asking you to help him with his heat.

─────────ೋღ 🌺 ღೋ─────────

This was something I wanted to do but never got around to do it and I'm finally doing it now so that's a start! :3

'𝐌𝐨𝐦𝐦𝐲 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐝𝐚𝐝𝐝𝐲 𝐚𝐫𝐞𝐧'𝐭 𝐢𝐧 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞, 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭'𝐬 𝐟𝐢𝐧𝐞 𝐈'𝐥𝐥 𝐬𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐥𝐞 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐭𝐰𝐨 𝐛𝐢𝐫𝐭𝐡𝐝𝐚𝐲𝐬.'

─────────ೋღ 🌺 ღೋ─────────

Help little (big 😍) kitty Cellbit in heat 😈  I promise he's gentle...
